title: Recording of API Training – Oct 25

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you to everyone who joined my API training earlier this week.

Here’s a recording of the session - I know I talk very fast, so I’m sure there are things you’ll want to rewatch

As a reminder, here are the resources I went over in the training (and others that might be useful):

  • Release Notes – follow the links to see an explanation of each change
  • New version migration guide
  • API Documentation

If you have any questions, post them as a new topic in the monday apps section of the community!
